modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Credit card machine not working after moving offices

full_description_text:  
User needs help with credit card machine.  
It was moved to a new office.  
The machine is not working now.  
They also want to lower the button volume.
short_description: Credit card machine not working after moving offices
description:
